themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "Pure beaten olive oil for the lampstand's light—the oil must be the finest quality, extracted...". Cross references echo "Light".

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "Pure beaten olive oil for the lampstand's light—the oil must be the finest quality, extracted...". Word-study detail reinforces "תְּצַוֶּ֣ה׀: And thou shalt command - (intensively) to constitute, enjoin".

themes.label: Truth
themes.summary: This chapter brings truth, faithfulness, revelation, or the trustworthiness of God into focus. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Word-study detail reinforces "הָֽעֵדֻ֗ת: which is before the testimony - testimony".
